reason: Self-contained yes/no rules question: must a <2yr novice driver display the corresponding distinguishing sign? Answerable from text alone (Так). No 'на малюнку/зображено' reference. The only candidate (35_163_0.jpeg) is a generic stock photo of a car rear window with a '70' sticker — irrelevant and not even the novice-driver sign; adds nothing needed.
